column1: # Canonical tier-1 prebuilt target table for fig-sys payload crates.
# Consumed by scripts/gen-payloads.sh, scripts/build-payload-lib.sh, and mirrored
# (by hand) into fig-sys/Cargo.toml cfg deps + fig-sys/build.rs payload_env_key.
# Adding a target = one row here + rerun gen-payloads.sh + add the cfg dep and
# build.rs arm. Targets NOT listed here fall back to the vendored zig source build.
# The prebuilt library is compiled with fig's DEFAULT language set (json, yaml,
# toml, fig on; zon, xml off); non-default feature sets always build from source.
